title: Stink Bug Control in Fordham, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional stink bug control in Fordham, Bronx. Experienced exterminators serving Fordham Manor, Belmont & Arthur Ave. Fast, effective treatment. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Stink bugs invading your Fordham home or business? These shield-shaped pests are common in the Bronx, especially during fall and spring when they seek shelter indoors. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive stink bug control services throughout Fordham, from the historic brownstones near Fordham University to the residential buildings along Kingsbridge Road.
whyUs: Our experienced technicians understand the unique pest challenges in Fordham's diverse housing stock, from pre-war walk-ups to university housing. We use proven methods to eliminate stink bug infestations and seal entry points, ensuring long-lasting protection for your property.
localContext: Fordham's mix of classic Bronx architecture, including century-old apartment buildings and row houses near Arthur Avenue and Fordham Plaza, creates numerous entry points for stink bugs seeking warmth. The tree-lined streets around Fordham University and proximity to the Bronx Zoo area make this neighborhood particularly attractive to these overwintering pests.

faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Fordham apartments?
faqs.answer: Fordham's older building stock, with its many cracks, gaps around windows, and aging infrastructure, provides numerous entry points for stink bugs. These pests are attracted to the warmth of buildings, especially in fall when temperatures drop, making them particularly prevalent in the neighborhood's historic structures.

faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 stink bug control service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection of your property, targeted treatment of stink bug hotspots, exterior perimeter treatment to prevent entry, sealing of entry points, and removal of existing bugs. Price varies based on property size and infestation severity. We also provide prevention tips to keep stink bugs from returning.

faqs.question: When is stink bug season in the Bronx?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are most active in Fordham during fall (September-November) when they seek indoor shelter for winter, and again in spring (March-May) when they emerge. However, if they've overwintered in your walls or attic, you may see them throughout winter on warm days or near heat sources.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to stink bug problems in Fordham?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Fordham locations. Stink bugs can quickly multiply and become a major nuisance, so we prioritize rapid response. Our technicians are familiar with the area around Fordham Road, Belmont, and the university campus, ensuring prompt arrival to address your infestation.
